purpose: Track what is already locally ready, what is blocked by live access, and what evidence is required before declaring each source active for the real Dashboard Coach pilot.

localReadiness.nextHumanCommand: Validate live with pilot coaches; run valider-dashboard-equipe.cmd after field checks.
notes: Firestore live audit passes with status needs_source_activation; next limit is field validation and Rebooking parity.
evidence: Firestore live audit passes and reports needs_source_activation.

currentLiveAuditAttempt.meaning: Firestore live audit is reachable after Hosting publication.
currentLiveAuditAttempt.nextHumanCommand: Use the live audit totals as the baseline for the 7-coach field validation.

lastPostPublicationAudit.summary: MVP Hosting and Firestore are reachable after publication. Technical validation is green; remaining proof is human validation of the seven pilot coach portfolios.

lastLiveReadOnlyAudit.summary: Live Hosting and Firestore are reachable. Scheduled sheet sync is still running for the seven pilot coaches. AUTO-009 now pushes new questionnaire responses toward Firestore through syncRequests; remaining warnings are data quality/source activation issues.

highestLeverageNextActions: Brancher ou confirmer la source officielle de telephone client avant de juger Questionnaire/GHL.
Auditer TASKS_Current comme source d'actions explicites et separer les vraies missions du bruit importe.
Prioriser le matching questionnaire par telephone et transformer les couleurs en filtres/action lisibles.
Tester l'envoi questionnaire seulement avec un client dont le telephone est confirme dans GHL, puis valider le journal Firestore.
Garder l'app rebooking legacy comme reference et ne migrer qu'apres parite telephone/sourceId.

globalRules: Firestore is the operational database read by the dashboard.
Google Sheets is allowed as backup, audit, or temporary source, but not as a mandatory bridge when a live script can push directly.
Every direct source must pass previewDashboardImportPayload_ before pushDashboardSourceToFirebase_.
No secret, tokenized Apps Script URL, GHL token, .env, token.json, or oauth-client.json can be stored in public files.
A live Apps Script or GHL change requires explicit Michael approval or a previously authorized source activation.
Rebooking legacy remains active until parity with Firebase is proven.

pilotSymptomTriage.symptom: A coach has no visible To-do or too many noisy To-do.
evidenceToCheck: sourceImportRuns for google_sheets_tasks_current or direct task generation
task source, type, status and sourceStale fields in Firestore
doNotDo: Do not create program tasks from ambiguous CoachRx program context.
Do not reopen completed, ignored, archived or sourceStale tasks on import.
pilotSymptomTriage.nextAction: Audit the task source first; keep only explicit coach actions and route ambiguous items to diagnostics instead of To-do.

pilotSymptomTriage.symptom: Clients are active but show missing phone.
evidenceToCheck: GHL exact phone/contact diagnostic and client_directory import proof
doNotDo: Do not let questionnaire or rebooking overwrite client phone.
Do not let a blank source value erase an existing phone.
Do not create active clients from orphan GHL contacts.
pilotSymptomTriage.nextAction: Enrich existing clients through client_directory or GHL server-side exact match, then verify the missing-phone count decreases.

pilotSymptomTriage.symptom: Questionnaire send fails or a response does not appear for the coach.
evidenceToCheck: A valider queue for unmatched phone or coach
doNotDo: Do not count Non envoye as a relance.
Do not create a false To-do without a real sent questionnaire or response action.
Do not expose GHL token or workflow details in public assets.
pilotSymptomTriage.nextAction: Confirm phone and GHL exact match, then verify send log and response import path by field key.

pilotSymptomTriage.symptom: Firebase Rebooking differs from the existing Apps Script app.
evidenceToCheck: legacy app open dossier count by coach
Firestore rebookings by status and matchMethod
history entries for Gere, Rebooke, Absence coach and Reouvrir
doNotDo: Do not replace the legacy app before parity is proven.
Do not publish tokenized Apps Script URLs.
Do not write back rebooking statuses until Michael approves the pilot write.
pilotSymptomTriage.nextAction: Run a read-only parity audit for one coach and keep the legacy app as source of use until counts and statuses match.

pilotSymptomTriage.symptom: A real coach cannot access or self-activate the dashboard.
evidenceToCheck: users/{uid} role, coachId and active fields
doNotDo: Do not open self-provision to coaches outside the approved pilot list.
Do not let a non-admin change coachId after activation.
pilotSymptomTriage.nextAction: Validate the email/CoachRx ID pair and create or repair the Firestore access record through the approved self-provision/admin path.

diagnosticPlaybooks.questionToAnswer: Est-ce que la To-do montre des actions coach reelles ou du bruit importe?
requiredEvidence: Compter les tasks ouvertes par source, type, status et sourceStale.
Verifier si les actions viennent de TASKS_Current, questionnaire, rebooking ou deduction CoachRx.
Confirmer que chaque action visible a un bouton clair et une prochaine action coach.
diagnosticPlaybooks.safeNextAction: Classer les items ambigus en diagnostic/source a verifier; ne garder en To-do que les actions explicites.
diagnosticPlaybooks.writeAllowedWhen: La source et le type de chaque To-do ouverte sont connus, non stale et actionnables.
doNotDo: Ne pas generer de tache programme depuis un contexte CoachRx ambigu.
Ne pas rouvrir une tache completee, ignoree, archivee ou stale.

diagnosticPlaybooks.questionToAnswer: Quelle source fiable peut confirmer le telephone du client actif?
requiredEvidence: Lister les clients actifs sans phoneNormalized par coach.
Verifier si GHL ou client_directory possede un telephone exact pour le client existant.
Confirmer qu'aucune valeur vide ne remplace un telephone deja utile.
diagnosticPlaybooks.safeNextAction: Enrichir seulement les clients existants par match exact ou validation admin; garder les conflits en A valider.
diagnosticPlaybooks.writeAllowedWhen: Le telephone vient d'une source prioritaire, matche un client existant et ne contredit pas silencieusement une valeur presente.
doNotDo: Ne pas creer de client actif depuis un contact GHL orphelin.
Ne pas laisser questionnaire ou rebooking corriger automatiquement le telephone.

diagnosticPlaybooks.questionToAnswer: Le probleme vient-il de l'envoi GHL, du matching telephone ou de l'import des reponses?
requiredEvidence: Verifier qu'un clic d'envoi cree une trace questionnaireSends avant l'appel GHL.
Verifier le match exact du telephone normalise dans GHL.
Verifier que la reponse importee est liee au coach/client ou envoyee dans A valider.
diagnosticPlaybooks.safeNextAction: Afficher l'erreur exacte au coach/admin et garder l'inbox en cinq vues: Reponses a lire, Envoyer, A relancer, A valider, Archives.
diagnosticPlaybooks.writeAllowedWhen: L'envoi est journalise, l'erreur est explicite, et une reponse est matchee par telephone ou classee A valider.
doNotDo: Ne pas compter Non envoye comme relance.
Ne pas creer une To-do questionnaire sans vrai envoi ou vraie reponse actionnable.

diagnosticPlaybooks.questionToAnswer: Firebase represente-t-il la meme realite que l'app rebooking legacy?
requiredEvidence: Comparer le nombre de dossiers ouverts par coach avec l'app legacy.
Comparer les statuts Ouvert, Gere, Rebooke, Absence coach et l'historique.
Verifier les rebookings sans clientId, sans telephone ou avec matchMethod fragile.
diagnosticPlaybooks.safeNextAction: Garder l'app legacy comme reference active et utiliser Firebase en lecture/diagnostic jusqu'a parite.
diagnosticPlaybooks.writeAllowedWhen: Les comptes, statuts et historiques matchent pour un coach pilote et Michael approuve le writeback.
doNotDo: Ne pas publier d'URL Apps Script tokenisee.
Ne pas remplacer l'app legacy avant preuve de parite.

diagnosticPlaybooks.questionToAnswer: Le courriel Google du coach correspond-il au CoachRx ID pilote autorise?
requiredEvidence: Verifier le courriel officiel du coach dans PILOT_COACH_ACCESS.json.
diagnosticPlaybooks.safeNextAction: Reparer l'acces avec le chemin admin/self-provision approuve seulement pour les sept coachs pilotes.
diagnosticPlaybooks.writeAllowedWhen: Le courriel est dans la liste officielle et le coachId correspond au CoachRx ID autorise.
doNotDo: Ne pas ouvrir l'auto-activation hors liste pilote.
Ne pas permettre a un coach non admin de changer coachId.

sharedEvidenceAlreadyDone: functions/index.js accepts ingestDashboardSource payloads for the supported sourceTypes.
firebase-dashboard/SOURCE_PAYLOAD_SAMPLES.json provides non-sensitive preview payloads for each sourceType.
verify-dashboard-before-deploy.cmd validates the source architecture before deployment.

sources.liveSource: CoachRx Sync Extension -> Apps Script Web App -> Google Sheets mirror -> Firebase dashboard sync
localEvidence: Backend accepts coachrx_clients.
Payload contract exists.
Activation kit has CoachRx card.
CoachRx direct does not require a Google Sheet intermediary when the extractor already has the live data.
CoachRx direct must not require a Google Sheet when the private extractor can send the same client payload to Firestore.
CoachRx imports must not create false program tasks from ambiguous program context.
Local no-overwrite validation confirms CoachRx enrichment preserves manualMembershipEndDate, kiloPlannedRecurrenceEndDate, riskLevel and notes.
Local sync tests cover seven pilot coaches and phone-first dedupe.
The quick pilot path keeps the existing CoachRx extension and Apps Script/Sheets mirror as the active source path.

Automatic To-do generation from ambiguous CoachRx program/compliance signals has been disabled in the Apps Script source; CoachRx is treated as client context unless another explicit action source creates work.
blockedBy: Need to deploy the patched Apps Script Web App files used by the CoachRx Sync Extension.
Need one real CoachRx extension import for one pilot coach after Apps Script deployment.
Need to run the existing Firebase/dashboard sync and confirm Clients/To-do reflect the updated Sheets source.
canDoWithoutMichael: Prepare sample payloads and rollback instructions.
Keep filtering false CoachRx client rows in local import logic.
needsMichaelOrBob: Authorize or run the Apps Script deployment for the live dashboard Web App.
Run the CoachRx Sync Extension on one pilot coach after deployment.
Confirm that the resulting Clients tab matches the visible CoachRx portfolio.
activationEvidenceRequired: The extension response reports the expected sourceSheet and dashboard rebuild diagnostics.
SRC_CoachRx_Browser_All contains fresh rows for the pilot coach.
Firebase/dashboard sync consumes the updated Sheets source.
Clients tab matches the live CoachRx portfolio.
To-do does not show false program tasks from ambiguous CoachRx context.
sources.rollback: Keep using the existing historical Sheet mirror import and ignore direct CoachRx-to-Firestore bridge work until the dashboard pilot is stable.

sources.domain: Phone, email, membership and admin client enrichment
sources.liveSource: CSM/Kilo/admin directory, CORE_Clients, CORE_Clients_Manual, or another confirmed phone source
localEvidence: Backend accepts client_directory.
Payload contract exists.
Merge rules protect useful existing values and manual fields.
Local no-overwrite validation confirms external client enrichment cannot erase manual membership end, Kilo recurrence, coach risk, notes, existing phone, existing email or existing membership.
The official source for client phone numbers must be confirmed before activation.
A successful client_directory import should reduce the Sans telephone count.
Manual membership end and Kilo recurrence must remain protected dashboard fields.
blockedBy: Need to confirm the official source for client phone numbers.
Need a private bridge from that source to Firebase or an approved temporary Sheet sync.
canDoWithoutMichael: Validate that empty imports cannot erase useful values.
needsMichaelOrBob: Confirm whether GHL, CSM, Kilo, or a manual directory wins for phone.
Authorize Bob Operator to add the bridge to the chosen source.
activationEvidenceRequired: Clients missing phone decreases for at least one real coach.
The Sans telephone counter decreases when the client_directory source provides a reliable phone.
Questionnaire send becomes available for clients enriched by phone.
Manual membership end, Kilo recurrence, coach risk and coach notes remain unchanged after import.
Conflicting phone changes go to validation instead of silent replacement.
sources.rollback: Disable the bridge, keep verified phone enrichments, and use CORE_Clients / CORE_Clients_Manual as backup audit.

sources.liveSource: GoHighLevel server-side lookup or private Apps Script bridge
localEvidence: Backend protects GHL from stale cleanup.
Questionnaire send uses server-side GHL token logic.
GHL matching is strict by normalized phone for questionnaire sends.
blockedBy: Need a private server-side bridge for bulk contact enrichment.
Need to avoid any browser-side GHL call.
Need to confirm GHL API permission and rate behavior for enrichment.
canDoWithoutMichael: Keep GHL non-destructive rules in validators.
Improve error reporting and docs around phone mismatches.
needsMichaelOrBob: Confirm GHL access path or authorize Bob Operator / server bridge setup.
Approve whether bulk contact enrichment is allowed during the pilot.
activationEvidenceRequired: A known phone matches exactly one GHL contactId.
No client is archived, deleted, transferred, or marked stale by GHL.
GHL errors are visible in sourceImportRuns or questionnaireSends.
No GHL token or private URL appears in public assets.
sources.rollback: Disable GHL enrichment and keep questionnaire sends reporting clear phone/contact errors.

sources.domain: Questionnaire inbox and coach follow-up signals
localEvidence: Backend accepts questionnaire_responses.
Questionnaire follow-up tests protect the 7-day relance rule.
Product audit verifies robust unknown field display and action-oriented response cards.
AUTO-009 Questionnaire client-coach V2 now queues new responses into Firestore syncRequests through Apps Script version 11.
Activation report exists in QUESTIONNAIRE_FIRESTORE_QUEUE_ACTIVATION.json and deployment report exists in QUESTIONNAIRE_APPS_SCRIPT_DEPLOYMENT.json.
blockedBy: Need one new real/test response after Apps Script version 11 to prove runtime Firestore queue authorization.
Need to validate phone-first matching and coach matching in the dashboard.
Need historical response backfill only after the new live path is proven.
canDoWithoutMichael: Keep reading by field key instead of column order.
Prepare historical backfill script and rollback notes without running it on production data.
needsMichaelOrBob: Submit or approve one safe questionnaire test response for one pilot coach.
Confirm whether unmatched responses should be backfilled after the live path is proven.
activationEvidenceRequired: A submitted response appears in Reponses a lire for the right coach.
Phone matching links the response to the right client when possible.
Unmatched responses land in A valider.
Lu and Creer une mission work without modifying immutable response content.
No false To-do is created for non-sent questionnaires.
sources.rollback: Continue reading Responses/Test_Responses from the questionnaire Sheet while direct bridge is corrected.

sources.domain: CSM check-ups for Performance and client history
localEvidence: Backend accepts checkups.
Performance logic includes check-ups by period.
Activation kit protects check-ups as read-only for client manual fields.
blockedBy: Need to confirm the live CSM check-up source and headers.
Need an Apps Script or scheduled bridge to push direct payloads.
canDoWithoutMichael: Document expected checkup fields and no-write-to-client-manual rule.
needsMichaelOrBob: Authorize Bob Operator to inspect/update AUTO-002.
Confirm which CSM tab/form is authoritative for coach check-ups.
activationEvidenceRequired: Check-ups count correctly in Performance for 7/30/60 days and month ranges.
Client history shows the latest relevant check-up.
No manual client fields change because of check-up import.
sources.rollback: Disable direct checkup bridge and keep the CSM form/sheet as admin register.

sources.liveSource: Existing rebooking Apps Script app / AUTO-003
localEvidence: Backend accepts rebooking.
Product audit protects rebooking status, history, reopen and absence flow.
Activation kit says legacy app remains the safety net.
blockedBy: Need parity audit between Firebase and the legacy app before direct write.
Need to confirm the source behind the legacy app.
Need to avoid tokenized Apps Script URLs in public files.
needsMichaelOrBob: Authorize Bob Operator to inspect AUTO-003 if deeper source comparison is needed.
Approve any direct rebooking write after parity is shown.
activationEvidenceRequired: Firebase and legacy app show the same open dossier counts for one coach.
Gere, Rebooke, Absence coach and Reouvrir preserve history.
A reimport does not reopen a handled/rebooked/absence item.
No tokenized legacy URL appears in public assets or docs.
sources.rollback: Keep the legacy rebooking app as source of use and disable direct Firebase rebooking bridge.

liveActivationWorkPackages.objective: Make the existing CoachRx Sync Extension path reliably feed the dashboard quickly through the Apps Script/Sheets mirror and Firebase sync, without forcing a Google Sheet intermediary when the live extractor can push the same safe payload later.
liveActivationWorkPackages.operator: Dashboard Apps Script owner or Bob Operator, only after explicit approval.
blockedUntil: The patched Apps Script receiver is deployed to the Web App used by the extension.
Michael runs one extension import for one pilot coach.
The existing Firebase/dashboard sync is run after the extension import.
liveActivationWorkPackages.previewLimit: 1 to 3 clients for one pilot coach.
liveActivationWorkPackages.firstWriteLimit: One pilot coach only; no global write.
mustProve: sourceImportRuns and coachSyncStatus show a successful import for the pilot coach.
Clients tab displays the expected portfolio after sync.
The extension response reports the expected Sheets mirror write.
SRC_CoachRx_Browser_All receives fresh rows for the pilot coach.
The dashboard sync imports the updated Sheets rows.
Clients tab matches the expected live CoachRx portfolio.
To-do does not create false program tasks from ambiguous CoachRx context.
liveActivationWorkPackages.rollback: Disable direct CoachRx bridge and ignore direct_coachrx_extension documents until corrected.

liveActivationWorkPackages.objective: Enrich Firestore clients with reliable phone, email and membership context while protecting manual dashboard fields.
liveActivationWorkPackages.operator: Bob Operator or chosen private directory source owner, only after source of truth is confirmed.
blockedUntil: Official phone source is confirmed: GHL, CSM, Kilo or admin directory.
DASHBOARD_IMPORT_TOKEN is available in the source script properties.
Michael approves a first pilot import.
liveActivationWorkPackages.previewLimit: One pilot coach with at least one known missing-phone client.
liveActivationWorkPackages.firstWriteLimit: One pilot coach only; no silent phone replacement on conflicts.
mustProve: Sans telephone decreases for the pilot coach.
Questionnaire send becomes available for newly enriched clients.
Manual membership end, Kilo recurrence, risk and notes are preserved.
Conflicting phones are routed to validation instead of silent replacement.
liveActivationWorkPackages.rollback: Disable directory bridge and keep verified client fields plus CORE_Clients / CORE_Clients_Manual as audit.

liveActivationWorkPackages.objective: Use GHL only as private server-side phone/contact enrichment and questionnaire action support.
liveActivationWorkPackages.operator: Firebase Function or private Apps Script bridge with GHL access; never the browser.
blockedUntil: GHL access path and permissions are confirmed.
Bulk enrichment is approved for the pilot.
Exact phone matching behavior is validated.
liveActivationWorkPackages.previewLimit: Known test phones only; no broad contact export.
liveActivationWorkPackages.firstWriteLimit: Enrichment only: contactId, phone, email or name. No archive, stale, delete or coach transfer.
mustProve: A known phone matches exactly one GHL contact.
No fallback to the first search result occurs.
GHL errors are visible in sourceImportRuns or questionnaireSends.
No GHL token appears in public assets.
No archive, stale, delete or transfer action is possible from this package.
liveActivationWorkPackages.rollback: Disable GHL enrichment and keep questionnaire sends reporting explicit contact or phone errors.

liveActivationWorkPackages.objective: Validate the active AUTO-009 direct queue so questionnaire V2 responses reliably feed the coach inbox by phone-first matching.
liveActivationWorkPackages.operator: AUTO-009 Apps Script version 11 plus Firebase processSyncRequest.
blockedUntil: One new questionnaire response is submitted after Apps Script version 11.
Firestore syncRequests processing is confirmed for that response.
The response lands in the right coach inbox or A valider.
liveActivationWorkPackages.firstWriteLimit: New responses only; response content remains immutable after import and content remains immutable for coach read/archive actions.
mustProve: Reponses a lire shows the imported response in the correct inbox.
Response appears in Reponses a lire for the right coach or A valider if unmatched.
Phone matching links to the right client when possible.
Lu and Creer une mission work without modifying response content.
No false To-do is created for non-sent questionnaires.
liveActivationWorkPackages.rollback: Return temporarily to reading Responses/Test_Responses while direct bridge is corrected.

liveActivationWorkPackages.objective: Feed Performance and client history from CSM check-ups without modifying manual client fields.
liveActivationWorkPackages.operator: Bob Operator on AUTO-002 or the CSM source owner.
blockedUntil: Authoritative CSM check-up tab/form is confirmed.
Headers are mapped by key instead of column position.
A pilot coach import is approved.
liveActivationWorkPackages.previewLimit: One pilot coach and a small recent date range.
liveActivationWorkPackages.firstWriteLimit: Check-up documents only; no client manual field writes.
mustProve: Performance counts check-ups for the selected period.
Client history shows the latest relevant check-up.
No manual client field is overwritten by a check-up import.
No manual membership end, Kilo recurrence, risk or notes are changed.
liveActivationWorkPackages.rollback: Disable direct checkup bridge and keep CSM form/sheet as admin register.

liveActivationWorkPackages.objective: Compare Firebase rebooking with the active legacy app before any direct writeback and keep the legacy rebooking app as active source until parity is proven.
liveActivationWorkPackages.operator: Bob Operator on AUTO-003 or the legacy rebooking source owner.
blockedUntil: Legacy source behind the current rebooking app is confirmed.
Parity counts are compared for one pilot coach.
Michael approves any Firebase writeback beyond read-only comparison.
liveActivationWorkPackages.previewLimit: One pilot coach, read-only comparison against the legacy app.
liveActivationWorkPackages.firstWriteLimit: No writeback until parity is proven. If approved later, one pilot coach only.
mustProve: Firebase and legacy app show the same open dossier counts for the pilot coach.
Gere, Rebooke, Absence coach and Reouvrir preserve history.
A reimport does not reopen handled, rebooked or absence items.
No tokenized legacy URL appears in public assets or docs.
liveActivationWorkPackages.rollback: Keep the legacy rebooking app as active source, keep the legacy rebooking app as active source of use, and disable direct Firebase rebooking writes.

nextNoInterventionWork: Keep validators aligned with this status registry.
Continue expanding local tests for source conflicts and no-overwrite rules.
Keep sample payloads for each sourceType aligned with contracts without real client data.
Document exact Bob Operator handoff steps per live script once access is approved.
knownHumanActions: Approve Bob Operator live Apps Script inspection before modifying scripts.
Confirm source of truth for client phone numbers.
Approve first direct write for one coach per source.
Verify live app behavior with real coach/client data after each activation.
